t_ch: 我没意见，就这么办吧！
t_en: Fine by me. Let's do it!

t_ch: 嗯，我也没问题。
t_en: All right. I don't have a problem with that.

t_ch: 没时间商量了，就这样吧。
t_en: Enough chit-chat, let's do this!

t_ch: 还有这种好事？
t_en: Say what now? I get to pair up with Firefly and there's no catch?

t_ch: 有我在，肯定嘎嘎乱赢。
t_en: It'll be a shoo-in with me around.

t_ch: 有人问过我的意见吗？
t_en: Hold up, has any of you even bothered to ask me for my consent to this?

t_ch: 哎呀，时间紧急，乖乖听大人话好不好啦！
t_en: Gah, time's ticking! Just listen to the grown-ups!

t_ch: 那就这么分组，大家抓紧时间吧。
t_en: We'll split into the assigned groups then. Let's not waste time.

t_ch: 回来得比想象中更快啊…有结果了？
t_en: You're back sooner than I thought... Any results?

t_ch: 嗯…现在，轮到我们开辟前路了。
t_en: Yes... And now, it's up to us to forge ahead.

t_ch: 哼，既然他的遗愿已经带到，我的最后一项任务也完成了。
t_en: Hmph, since his last will has now been conveyed, my final mission is complete.

t_ch: 不过，别嫌我说话不好听，有斗志是好事，但米哈伊尔留给你们的路可不好走……
t_en: But, pardon me if I sound curt — it's good to have determination, but the path Mikhail left for you is not an easy one to tread...

t_ch: 否则，他又何必在孤独中睡去，对你们这群未来的无名客孤注一掷呢？
t_en: Why else would he have chosen to sleep in solitude, staking everything on some Nameless in the future?

t_ch: 不过你们人多。呵，倒是有机会输得慢点。
t_en: But you have the numbers, and in numbers comes strength. So that might just delay your inevitable a little more.

t_ch: 你还挺会鼓励人的哈……
t_en: Got any more encouraging words?

t_ch: 依我看，光靠瓦尔特参与谈判肯定远远不够。且不论对方是否会乖乖就范，谈判这件事本身只能给我们创造一个和对方分庭抗礼的机会，不能带来任何优势。
t_en: As I see it, relying on Welt's negotiations alone is far from enough. Regardless of whether the other party will be compliant, negotiating simply allows us to meet them as equals, it won't grant us an upper hand.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼是对手的主场，我们可用的筹码本就少之又少。与其在家族的封锁下坐以待毙，不如选择主动进攻。
t_en: Penacony is our rival's home turf, and we already have very few chips left to play with. Rather than idly sit around while The Family's got us blocked off, an offensive approach might be a wiser course of action.

t_ch: 我们熟悉星核的特性，而星核作为稳定美梦的核心，对家族至关重要。触碰对方的核心利益，他们必定会急忙反扑…而「急忙」恰恰意味着「破绽」。
t_en: We're more familiar with the Stellaron's properties than most, and since it's the key to stabilizing the sweet dream, it's vital to The Family's interests. By attacking their core interests, they're bound to retaliate hastily... and as the saying goes: Haste makes waste.

t_ch: 没错。只要能威胁到星核，无论是谈判还是战斗，都有机会占据上风。
t_en: That's right — as long as we pose a threat to the Stellaron, either with words or otherwise, we have a chance at gaining the upper hand.

t_ch: 但问题在于，正值谐乐大典召开前夕，我们要如何才能接近大剧院？家族势必会设下重重防守，强行突围…就算能做到，风险也太高了。
t_en: But the problem is: On the eve of the Charmony Festival opening, how exactly are we going to get close to the theater? Family security will be airtight, and if we brute force it... Even if we succeed, it's too risky.

t_ch: 诶…居然没人说话吗？那我就举手了！这题我知道！
t_en: So... no one's gonna say anything? Then I'll raise my hand — I know the answer to this question!

t_ch: 竟然是你？
t_en: You, of all people?

t_ch: 什么话啊？信不信由你！
t_en: What's that supposed to mean!? You'd better believe it!

t_ch: 还得是你！
t_en: Of course, you do! I never doubted you for a sec.

t_ch: 哎～没了我，这个列车组怕是要散啦。
t_en: The Express crew would've been disbanded long ago if it weren't for me!

t_ch: 原来我们还有一支奇兵没用…
t_en: Looks like we have one more ace up our sleeves. Time for the masterstroke!

t_ch: 你怎么说话和那位罗浮将军似的……
t_en: Why are you speaking like the general of the Luofu?

t_ch: 是这样的，我听说谐乐大典开始前，会开放给盛典预热的选秀会场，叫什么…「苏乐达™盛会海选」，就在「热砂的时刻」。
t_en: So, I heard that before the Charmony Festival begins, there will be a pageant to kick off the festival. It's called the... SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions or something, and it's going to be held in the Moment of Scorchsand.

t_ch: 只要拿下第一名，我们就能夺得盛会巨星的称号，受到知更鸟小姐的亲自接见…不过这个不重要啦，重要的是我们能比普通观众更早进入大剧院！
t_en: As long as we clinch the top spot, we'll be able to attain the title of Festive Superstar and be able to personally bask in the graces of Miss Robin... Not that that's important. What's crucial is that we can enter the Grand Theater before the audience arrives!

t_ch: 那…要怎么才能参加这个「盛会海选」呢？
t_en: So how do we go about participating in these Festivity Auditions?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，其实我从知更鸟小姐的粉丝群里拿到了几张特邀门票！
t_en: Heh-heh, I've already procured special invite tickets from Miss Robin's fan club!

t_ch: 实不相瞒，我一直在筹备参加这场选秀呢。但现在看来，就算能脱颖而出，大概也没机会和知更鸟小姐握手了……
t_en: To tell you the truth, I'd been preparing to join the auditions all along. But now it looks like even if I scrape through, I probably still won't have the chance to shake Miss Robin's hand...

t_ch: 原来这玩意还在办啊…明明最早是米哈伊尔为了引人注目特意搞的噱头。倒是有一试的价值。
t_en: So they're still running this thing eh... It was originally just a publicity stunt set up by Mikhail to drum up attention, but it looks like it might be worth a shot.

t_ch: 就按小三月说的来吧。加拉赫先生，你会和我们同行吗？
t_en: We'll follow March's plan. Mr. Gallagher, will you be joining us?

t_ch: …恐怕我没那个时间了。作为「虚构人物」…我已经完成了自己的最后一项任务，匹诺康尼能否从梦中醒来，就全看你们的了。
t_en: ...I'm afraid I won't have the time. As a {RUBY_B#Fictionologist}"virtual character"{RUBY_E#}... I've already completed my final mission. Whether Penacony can awaken from this dream is all down to you.

t_ch: 如果还能再见面…请一定要来列车上坐坐。
t_en: Should we ever cross paths again, I'd love for you to visit the Express.

t_ch: 好啊。我会给你们的列车智库再添上几笔的。
t_en: Alright. I'll have to add to that data bank of yours you've got on the Express.

t_ch: 而流萤小姐，感谢你此前提供的帮助。大敌当前，只要星核猎手和星穹列车的目的一致，我们也愿意与你合作。
t_en: And Miss Firefly, we thank you for all your support. We're faced with a formidable enemy. As long as the Astral Express and Stellaron Hunters' objectives are aligned, we're willing to cooperate with you.

t_ch: 已经走了这么远的路，就让我和你们一起走完匹诺康尼的旅途吧。很高兴最后我们能并肩而立，这确实是最好的结局了。
t_en: We've already come this far together. I'd like to join you for the rest of your journey on Penacony. I'm pleased that we can finally fight shoulder-to-shoulder — I couldn't ask for a better ending.

t_ch: 这也正是「开拓」之旅的意义。那我们就出发吧，各位。
t_en: This is also the spirit of the Trailblaze. Now, everyone, let's prepare to move out.

t_ch: 欢迎来到由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场热砂盛典第一关：「戏梦奇战」！在这一关里，您可以选择「演技派」或「动作派」两种挑战。
t_en: Welcome to the first stage of SoulGlad™ Enterprises' thirty-third Scorchsand Festival of the twentieth season: Dreamplay Fantasia! In this stage, you can choose between two challenges: The School of Acting or School of Action.

t_ch: 在「演技派」挑战中，您需要根据三份剧本完成表演，打动现场的评委；在「动作派」挑战中，您需要干净利落地战胜三组敌人，抵达终点。
t_en: In the School of Acting challenge, you have to complete three performances from three scripts and move the panel judges. In the School of Action challenge, you have to defeat three groups of enemies convincingly and reach the end.

t_ch: 现在——开始您的选择！
t_en: Now... make your choice!

t_ch: 戏梦大舞台，有梦你就来！欢迎来到「演技派」舞台！
t_en: The Stage of Dreams, for those who dare to dream! Welcome to the School of Acting stage!

t_ch: 请走上舞台，用你真挚的表演打动评委！匹诺康尼下一位银河之星——就是你！
t_en: Step onto the stage and move the judges with your heartfelt performance! The next Cosmic Star of Penacony — could be you!

t_ch: 二位选手，现在由我来为您介绍这一关的规则。
t_en: Competitors, allow me to introduce the rules of this challenge to you.

t_ch: 前方一共有三座舞台。在每座舞台上，你们都能拿到一份剧本梗概。这三份剧本均出自电影大亨「钟表匠」之手，描绘了匹诺康尼拓荒时代的种种逸闻。
t_en: There are three stages up ahead. On each, you will find an outline of a script. These three scripts were written by the legendary filmmaker, the Watchmaker, and depict various stories from Penacony's era of pioneering.

t_ch: 你们需要想象当时的情景，说出合适的台词，做出恰如其分的表演，让各位评委体会到剧本中想要传达的感情。预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
t_en: Your task is to bring those moments to life, find the right words, and act convincingly to make the judges feel the script's intended emotions. I wish you a successful performance!

t_ch: 顺带一提，本关的最高分记录由一位红发选手创造，他精湛的演技竟令最严苛的评委也泪洒赛场，高度评价道——「不像演的！」
t_en: Also, a bit of trivia: The record score for this stage is held by a participant with fiery red hair. His exceptional performance brought even the strictest judge to tears— It's like he wasn't even acting at all!

t_ch: 啊…哈哈…事态紧急，我们还是速战速决吧，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Ah... Haha... We are running out of time, so let's get this over with quickly, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 噢，看看这对妙人儿，多有明星相啊！既然你们是双人组合，那我就为你们准备一个双人对戏的场景吧！
t_en: Oof, just take a look at this pair. Such star quality! Since you've come as a pair, I'll prep a two-person scene for you!

t_ch: 二位——准备好了吗？
t_en: You two, are you ready?

t_ch: 准备好了。
t_en: Ready.

t_ch: 现在，想象你们二人受到拓荒感召，第一次踏上匹诺康尼的梦之土地。可是这里黄沙漫天，一片荒芜，根本不是「钟表匠」口中的乐土！
t_en: Envision that you both, driven by the spirit of exploration, are arriving at the land of dreams that is Penacony for the first time. But! Instead of lush lands, you find yourselves amidst swirling sands and desolation, far from the paradise the Watchmaker described.

t_ch: 你们在梦境的荒野上开着破旧的老爷车，喝着冷风、呛着黄沙、还被一只凶残的忆域迷因挡住了去路……
t_en: You're driving an old clunker through the wilderness of the Dreamscape, braving the cold wind, choking on the dust, and suddenly, a fierce Memory Zone Meme blocks your path...

t_ch: 现在——{NICKNAME}，什么样的台词才能表达你对匹诺康尼的「失望」？
t_en: Now... {NICKNAME}, what line would you deliver to express your disappointment in Penacony?

t_ch: 太好了！我喜欢刺激的生活！
t_en: Great! I love living on the wild side!

t_ch: 不对吧…让你表演「失望」，你怎么这么雀跃……
t_en: No... that's not right... You're trying to express disappointment. Why do you sound so chipper?

t_ch: 好凶残的生物！直接撞过去！
t_en: A brutish creature! Quick! Let's run it over!

t_ch: 那个…你平时都是这样表达「失望」的吗……
t_en: Uh... Do you usually express disappointment this way...?

t_ch: 什么鬼地方！钟表匠这个骗子！
t_en: What in tarnation is this hellhole! The Watchmaker is a big fat liar!

t_ch: 很好！接下来——虽然你很失望，但你的搭档反而很激动。现在！这位姑娘，你会说——
t_en: Very good! Now, though you're disappointed, your screen partner is conversely very enthusiastic. Now, young lady! You will say...

t_ch: 「太、太好了！我喜欢这种…刺、刺激的生活！」
t_en: "Th—This is great! I love living on the... w—wild side!"

t_ch: 可以，非常激动！然后到了故事下一幕——你们找到了一份修铁路的工作，但日夜辛劳、体力不支，最后倒在了沙漠深处……
t_en: Very good! Very intense! And then we cut to the story's next scene — you find a job mending the rails, but the days are long, and your endurance can't keep up, and you finally collapse in the endless expanse of desert...

t_ch: 突然！从天而降的甘霖滋润了你们的嘴唇，唤醒了你们奋斗的精神。
t_en: Suddenly! Sweet rain falls from the sky, wetting your lips, and rousing your spirits.

t_ch: 现在——{NICKNAME}，什么样的台词最适合表达你此时的「惊喜」？
t_en: Now... {NICKNAME}, what line will best express your surprise at this moment?

t_ch: 匹诺康尼果然处处是机遇！
t_en: O, Penacony, my Penacony! You truly abound with opportunities!

t_ch: 不如让我渴死算了！
t_en: Just let me die of thirst instead!

t_ch: 不对吧…这句台词听上去也不是很「惊喜」。
t_en: That's not right... That line doesn't sound very "surprised".

t_ch: 也许我们就是无法成功。
t_en: Perhaps we were never meant to succeed.

t_ch: 已经换题啦！现在要表演「惊喜」，不是「失望」……
t_en: We're already at the next scene! You need to convey surprise now, not disappointment...

t_ch: 但此时，你的搭档却仰望天空，闭上双眼。雨滴落下，视野也一片模糊，她悲伤地说——
t_en: But at this moment, your partner yet gazes into the sky, both her eyes closed. The rain drops fall, blurring her vision, and she tragically says...

t_ch: 「也、也许我们就是无法成功…对不对？」
t_en: "P—Perhaps we were never meant to succeed... Right?"

t_ch: 太棒了！两位的台词功底真是无比深厚！不过，台词并非表演的全部，请在第二个舞台继续这个故事吧……
t_en: Fantastic! Both of you have an incredibly solid foundation in dialogue delivery! However, lines aren't everything in a performance. Please continue this story on the second stage...

t_ch: 接下来，你们将面对「肢体」的考验！
t_en: Up next, you'll be challenged with a body language test.

t_ch: 希望这样的考验不会持续太久……
t_en: I hope these tests won't take too long...

t_ch: 在我这，二位需要用精湛的「肢体语言」诠释我描绘的故事情境。
t_en: Here, you two are required to skillfully utilize body language to portray the story context I've laid out for you.

t_ch: 书接上回，一场大雨拯救了倒在沙漠中的你们。这场雨浇灭了你心中的愤怒，你看着身边已经毫无斗志的同伴，想要安慰她……
t_en: Picking up from where we left off, a heavy downpour saves you both stranded in the desert. This rain quenches the anger in your heart. You look to your companion, now completely devoid of fighting spirit, wanting to comfort her...

t_ch: 此时——你应该做出怎样的举动来「逗笑」她？
t_en: At this moment, what should you do to make her laugh?

t_ch: （摸摸对方的头）
t_en: (Pat her head)

t_ch: 谁会被这样逗笑啦……
t_en: You seriously think that would make someone laugh?

t_ch: （讲一个冷笑话）
t_en: (Tell a dad joke)

t_ch: 现在考验的是「肢体语言」…应该不能用台词糊弄过去吧？
t_en: The test now is about body language... I don't think dialogue is allowed here.

t_ch: （站起来，准备出发）
t_en: (Stand up and prepare to move out)

t_ch: 这不像要逗我笑，倒像是要抛下我了……
t_en: You look less like you want to make me laugh, and more like you want to abandon me.

t_ch: （在沙子里打滚）
t_en: (Roll about in the sand)

t_ch: 啊…这……
t_en: Ah... Wha... *laughs*

t_ch: 回答正确！同伴看着你在沙子里打滚，想起此行种种坎坷。她忍不住笑出声，内心的希望重新燃起，所以这位姑娘——
t_en: Right answer! Your companion sees you rolling about in the sand, and thinks about the arduous obstacles along this journey. She can't help but let loose a laugh, rekindling hope in her heart — and so this girl...

t_ch: 我会…站起来，和他一起再次出发。
t_en: I'm... gonna get back on my feet and keep moving forward.

t_ch: 太感人了！故事继续发展，那场大雨令二位嗅到了商机，你们开始进军雨伞行业，可生意刚有起色，竞争对手就开始大量倾销低价商品挤占市场。
t_en: A tug at the heartstrings! The story continues to develop. The heavy rain leads you both to sense a business opportunity, so you start venturing into the umbrella industry. But just as the business begins to pick up, competitors start flooding the market with low-priced goods, squeezing your market share.

t_ch: 你们不得不将高价囤积的货物赔本销售…这无异于饮鸩止渴，把你们拖到了破产边缘。这个时候——不服输的你会做出怎样的决定？
t_en: You have no choice — the goods you stockpiled at high prices have to be sold at a loss... This is a pretty self-destructive move which drives your business to the brink of bankruptcy. At this moment, what would you — who refuses to admit defeat — decide to do?

t_ch: （心灰意冷地离开）
t_en: (Leave dejectedly)

t_ch: 你转过身，决绝地离开了，嘴里还念念有词——「英雄背井离家乡，来到美梦去开荒，美梦要是不留我，{F#老娘}{M#老子}投奔泯灭帮……」
t_en: You turn around, leaving resolutely, muttering under your breath — "The hero's quest started with a bang. For this dream I've toiled and sang. If the dream repays me in pang, then I, the {M#man}{F#woman}, will join the Annihilation Gang...."

t_ch: 这完全是服输了吧…快回来快回来……
t_en: That's totally giving up... Come back here!

t_ch: （跪地求饶）
t_en: (Get on my knees and grovel)

t_ch: 你扑腾一声跪倒在地，向你的商界对手哐哐磕大头。人能平安活一世，无非就靠四个大字——「好汉饶命」！
t_en: You drop to your knees with a resounding thud and start to repeatedly bash your head hard against the floor, kowtowing enthusiastically to your business rival. The key to a peaceful life lies in these five powerful words — "Show me mercy, pretty please!"

t_ch: 快起来啦…没有人靠磕头打商战的吧……
t_en: Get up! No one wins a trade war by kowtowing...

t_ch: （拍案而起）
t_en: (Stand up and smack the table)

t_ch: 你拍案而起，想让你知难而退？不可能！逐梦客可以被击倒，但不会被击败！
t_en: You slam the table and rise up. They think you'll back down? Impossible! Dreamchasers can be knocked down, but never knocked out.

t_ch: 太棒了！可惜，你的朋友并不认同。看着你债台高筑的样子，她深感未来无望，然后——
t_en: Fantastic! But it's a pity, your friend does not agree. Seeing that you're up to your eyeballs in debt, she sees nothing but despair in her future, and then...

t_ch: 呃…那我心灰意冷，离开匹诺康尼…可以吗？
t_en: Uh... I leave Penacony in utter disappointment... Is that okay?

t_ch: 可以，太可以了！二位有着卓越的表演才能，我都要看哭了！
t_en: Of course! Absolutely! I was this close to tears. Both of you possess exceptional acting talent!

t_ch: 但后面才是真正的挑战，你们将面对本节目有史以来最严苛的评委，只能凭借自身完美的演技令对方折服！
t_en: However, the true test is yet to come. You're about to encounter the harshest judge this show has ever seen. You'll need to rely on perfect performances if you want to win them over.

t_ch: 欢迎来到最终舞台。其实你们方才经历的情节，全都出自电影《逐梦往事》。
t_en: Welcome to the final stage. Actually, all the scenarios that you previously encountered, were all from the film Once Upon a Time in Dreams.

t_ch: 两位同路人揣着梦想来到一无所有的匹诺康尼，他们渴望成功，却屡受挫折。最后，其中一人不愿放弃，债台高筑；另外一人则放弃事业，离开了这里。
t_en: Two companions arrive on Penacony with nothing but a dream. Their desire for achievement is met with continuous setbacks. Ultimately, one continues on, despite spiraling into debt, while the other concedes defeat and leaves.

t_ch: 多年之后，他们在繁华的匹诺康尼再次相见，却迟迟不敢相认，因为——
t_en: Many years later, their paths cross once more in the thriving Penacony, yet they refuse to acknowledge each other because...

t_ch: 我成为大亨，她穷困潦倒。
t_en: I became a big shot, but she ended up destitute.

t_ch: 我穷困潦倒，她生活平凡。
t_en: I fell into poverty, while she's leading a normal life.

t_ch: 我生活平凡，她穷困潦倒。
t_en: I'm leading a normal life, but she ended up destitute.

t_ch: 在焕然一新的匹诺康尼，你们看着对方，再见的欣喜与离别的悲伤，形同陌路的尴尬与久别重逢的羞怯，此刻一起涌上心头。
t_en: Against the backdrop of a revitalized Penacony, the joy of reunion mixes with the sorrow of past separation, the awkwardness of being strangers, and the shyness of a long-awaited encounter, all converging at this very moment.

t_ch: 来吧，试着将这一幕的悲欣交集——用精准的演技传达给我吧！
t_en: Give it a shot. Try and convey this bittersweet scene to me — bring it to life with precise and emotive acting!

t_ch: 这也太没完没了了…要不然你试试那个吧？就是那个…钟表把戏。
t_en: Ugh... Is this ever going to end? I know, why don't you try that... clockwork thing you used before.

t_ch: 奇人擂台战，等你来夺冠！欢迎来到动作明星的秀场！
t_en: The champion's crown awaits you on the stage! Welcome to the arena of Action Stars!

t_ch: 请走上舞台，用华丽的战斗技巧，制裁那些邪恶的反派角色吧！匹诺康尼下一位动作之星，就是你！
t_en: Please make your way to the stage and vanquish those malevolent scoundrels with your dazzling fighting techniques! The title of Penacony's next big action star awaits you!

t_ch: 二位选手，现在由我来为您介绍这一关的规则。
t_en: Competitors, allow me to introduce the rules of this challenge to you.

t_ch: 前方一共有三座舞台，每座舞台上都有一场挑战。挑战的敌人都是电影《逐梦往事》中的反派角色。干脆利落地打倒敌人，创造新的记录吧！
t_en: There are a total of three stages up ahead, each with their own challenges. The enemies you will contend against are antagonists from the film Once Upon a Time in Dreams. Defeat them swiftly and decisively to set a new record!

t_ch: 顺便一提，本关的最高记录由一位红发选手创造！他击败全部三座舞台上的敌人，竟然只用时——5分钟！
t_en: It's worth mentioning that the fastest time for this stage was achieved by a contestant with fiery red hair. Astoundingly, he overcame all enemies across the three stages in only five minutes!

t_ch: 事态紧急，我们就速战速决吧，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Time is of the essence. Let's make this quick, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 二位选手，你们即将面对的，是原初梦境的怪物！彼时，匹诺康尼还处于一无所有的荒芜年代，梦境混乱无序，忆域迷因四处横行！
t_en: Contestants, you are about to confront the monsters of the Primordial Dreamscape! During this period, Penacony was nothing but a barren wasteland — the Dreamscape was fraught with strife and disorder, with Memory Zone Memes running rampant!

t_ch: 身为来到匹诺康尼的逐梦客，打倒他们，是你迈向成功的第一步！
t_en: As Dreamchasers who've come to Penacony, defeating them is your first step towards success!

s_ch: 被迫扮演怪物的气泡锂犬
s_en: Bubble Hound who's been forced to play a monster
t_ch: 嗷——呜——汪！苏乐达™全部都是我们的！不要妄想夺走苏乐达™！
t_en: Aoo — Woo — Woof woof woof! All the SoulGlad™ is ours! Don't even think about plundering the SoulGlad™ from us!

t_ch: 恭喜你们成为了最早的逐梦客！你们受到「钟表匠」感召，却失望地发现匹诺康尼根本没有遍地黄金，无奈之下，你们从底层做起，等待成功的机会。
t_en: Congratulations on becoming the first group of Dreamchasers! Answering the call from the Watchmaker, you are disappointed to learn that Penacony isn't paved with gold. Resigned to your current plight, you start from the hierarchical dredges, biding your time for a chance at success.

t_ch: 在即将放弃的时候，一场大雨令二位嗅到了商机，你们开始进军雨伞行业，可生意刚有起色，就遇到了竞争对手——打败对方，为自己赢得商战！
t_en: Just as you're about to give up, a downpour sparks a business idea — you enter the umbrella business! But just as things are looking up, you encounter a competitor. Defeat them and emerge victorious from this trade war!

t_ch: 为什么竞争对手…是苏乐达？
t_en: Why is our opponent... SoulGlad?

t_ch: 因为，这里是苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场盛会海选！
t_en: Because, this is SoulGlad™ Enterprises' thirty-third Festivity Auditions of the twentieth season!

t_ch: 是植入广告啊……
t_en: Isn't this just product placement...?

s_ch: 被迫扮演怪物的甜猿泰山
s_en: Sweet Gorilla who's been forced to play a monster
t_ch: 为了捍卫苏乐达™的尊严，我将飞上天空，成为最闪亮的猩，呜喳喳喳！
t_en: To safeguard the integrity of SoulGlad™, I will soar high into the sky and become its shiniest star, whoosh!

t_ch: 两位逐梦客，恭喜你们站稳脚跟，成为匹诺康尼冉冉升起的新星。但此时，又一位竞争对手低价倾销，将你们拖入破产的边缘。
t_en: Congratulations to our two Dreamchasers for establishing yourselves as budding stars in Penacony. However, now you face a competitor selling at low prices, pushing you to the brink of bankruptcy.

t_ch: 无论多么漫长的战斗，你都坚持了下来，打倒这位强敌，便能峰回路转，迎来成功！
t_en: No matter how lengthy the battle, you always persevere. Topple this powerful opponent, and the tides will turn, paving a way to success!

s_ch: 被迫扮演怪物的十七分熟弟弟
s_en: Lil' Beyond Overcooked Forced to Play Monster
t_ch: 任何人都别想夺取我的苏乐达™！我将运用化龙妙法，化身为恐龙，嘎呜——！
t_en: None will take my SoulGlad™ away from me! I will use the Transmutation Arcanum to turn into a dinosaur! *rawrr*

s_ch: 被迫扮演怪物的十七分熟哥哥
s_en: Big Beyond Overcooked Forced to Play Monster
t_ch: 龙啊，请将我的敌人都吞噬吧，嘎呜——！
t_en: O dinosaur, devour my enemies, grawwrr!

s_ch: 被迫扮演怪物的十七分熟们
s_en: The Beyond Overcooked who've been forced to play monsters
t_ch: 喝下这瓶苏乐达™，快乐美梦速速达，嘎呜——！
t_en: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad™, and make your dreams a blast! Grawwrr!

t_ch: 这战斗和剧情也太脱节了吧……
t_en: Isn't this fight way off from the actual storyline?

t_ch: 难道「化身为恐龙」还不够充满想象力，这是只在匹诺康尼才能看见的浪漫。现在，言归正传——
t_en: Transforming into a dinosaur isn't imaginative enough for you? This is the sort of magic only seen on Penacony. Anyway, let's get back on track. Where were we? Oh, that's right—

t_ch: 漫长的战斗后，你终于胜利了，但当年和你一同来到匹诺康尼的伙伴，却因看不到希望而早早离去。
t_en: After an extended battle, you finally emerged victorious, but the companion who journeyed to Penacony with you chose to leave — having lost all hope.

t_ch: 多年以后，你们在繁华的匹诺康尼再次相见，却不敢相认。也许这就是每一位逐梦客都可能留下的遗憾吧。
t_en: In the years that followed, you encountered each other once more on the prosperous streets of Penacony, but dared not call out to one another. Perhaps akin to the lingering regret of every Dreamchaser.

t_ch: 恭喜你们，用战斗为我们重现了《逐梦往事》中精彩的动作表演！
t_en: Well done! You brought to life the thrilling action scenes from Once Upon a Time in Dreams with your fighting skills!

t_ch: 恭喜两位选手顺利通关！但比起通关，我们更关心——二位玩得还开心吗？「开心」比「成功」更重要！
t_en: Congrats to both of you for clearing the stage! But more importantly: Are you having fun? Fun is more important than success!

t_ch: 看时间，你们可是比那位红发选手还要快上不少啊！
t_en: Look at the time! You've finished much faster than that red-haired contestant did!

t_ch: 这红发选手…到底是谁呀？
t_en: That red-haired contestant... Who is that exactly?

t_ch: 你们会知道的，但前提是，二位能成功通过接下来的考验！欢迎来到由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场热砂盛典第二关——「枪火时间」！
t_en: You'll find out eventually, but only if you clear the next test first! Welcome to the second stage of the thirty-third Scorchsand Festival in the twentieth season, sponsored by SoulGlad™ Enterprises — Gunfire Time!

t_ch: 你们可以选择「枪火」，接受哈努兄弟的试炼；也可以选择「时间」，接受钟表小子的试炼。
t_en: You have the option to choose "Gunfire" and undergo Brother Hanu's trial, or "Time," where you'll face Clockie's trial.

t_ch: 现在——开始您的选择！
t_en: Now... make your choice!

t_ch: 呵呵…好久不见，哈努兄弟。你看起来可真是着急，想来上一场紧张刺激的「筑梦拼图」释放一下么？
t_en: Long time no see, Hanu. You look pretty stressed out. How about an intense and thrilling game of Dream Jigsaw to blow off some steam?

t_ch: 其实，剧情要求你提供帮助。
t_en: Actually, the plot dictates that you directly provide aid to us.

t_ch: 「其实，剧情要求你提供帮助。」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: "Actually, the plot dictates that you directly provide aid to us." - You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

t_ch: 「筑梦拼图」很紧张刺激吗？
t_en: Is Dream Jigsaw really that intense and thrilling?

t_ch: 「『筑梦拼图』很紧张刺激吗？」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: "Is Dream Jigsaw really that intense and thrilling?" You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

t_ch: 天哪，我第一次看见你蹲下。
t_en: Gosh, this is the first time I've ever seen you crouch down.

t_ch: 「天哪，我第一次看见你蹲下。」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: "Gosh, this is the first time I've ever seen you crouch down." You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

t_ch: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

t_ch: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。这可能是有史以来最酷的*哼*了。
t_en: You let out a cool *hmph*. It might just be the coolest hmph in history.

t_ch: 天哪…你是说，石头老板集结了坏蛋，想要攻占美梦小镇？这可真是不幸…呵呵。
t_en: Oh, my, are you telling me that Boss Stone has rallied the villains to seize Dreamville? What a dreadful twist of fate...

t_ch: 听好了，哈努兄弟。我知道你需要一把合适的武器，我也知道它就在楼上……
t_en: Listen closely, Hanu. I'm aware you're in need of a suitable weapon, and I also know there's one just upstairs...

t_ch: 但是，你知道吗？你必须得玩一把紧张刺激的「筑梦拼图」，否则就不能通过这里…呵呵。
t_en: But, you know what? You'll have to play an exhilarating round of Dream Jigsaw first. No jigsaw, no moving forward.

t_ch: 这不公平！你现在就得帮我。
t_en: That's not fair! You have to help me now.

t_ch: 「这不公平！你现在就得帮我。」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: "It's not fair! You have to help me." — You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

t_ch: 武器和筑梦拼图有什么关系？
t_en: What do the weapon and Dream Jigsaw have to do with one another?

t_ch: 「武器和筑梦拼图有什么关系？」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: "What is the relationship between the weapon and the Dream Jigsaw?" You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

t_ch: 美梦小镇有危险！你不明白吗？
t_en: Dreamville's in danger! How do you not understand the predicament?

t_ch: 「美梦小镇有危险！你不明白吗？」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: "Dreamville is in danger! Don't you understand?" You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

t_ch: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

t_ch: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。这么酷的*哼*只有这么酷的你才能发出来，完美。
t_en: You make a cool *hmph*. Only someone as cool as you could produce such a cool *hmph*. Perfection!

t_ch: 好了，快去吧，哈努兄弟。但要小心，有两个坏家伙也盯上了拼图碎片…要么想办法打昏他们，要么就别被他们发现。
t_en: Now, scurry along, Hanu. But tread carefully – two ne'er-do-wells are also eyeing those jigsaw pieces... Either outsmart them with a quick knockout, or ensure they don't catch you in the act.

t_ch: 我已经迫不及待想要看你完成「筑梦拼图」了…呵呵。加油，哈努兄弟。
t_en: I can't wait to see you finish the Dream Jigsaw... Best of luck, Hanu!

t_ch: 亲爱的朋友，欢迎光临「钟表匠」构造的美妙世界！在前方等待你们的，是钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟！
t_en: Dear friends, welcome to the enchanting universe created by the Watchmaker! Awaiting you is the morally dubious yet ever-charming character from the animated Clockie series — Hanu!

t_ch: 据说，这些卡通人物的灵感都源于「钟表匠」的亲身经历。据钟表小子学家考证，现实中的哈努兄弟原型曾与「钟表匠」有着深厚的友谊，可谓是战友一般的存在。
t_en: It is said that these cartoon characters were inspired by the Watchmaker's own experiences. According to research by Clockie scholars, the original Hanu of reality shared a deep friendship with the Watchmaker, akin to comrades-in-arms.

t_ch: 通过门口的电视便可跃入哈努兄弟的世界，与它共度一段美妙惊险的故事——祝你们顺利通关！
t_en: Enter into the world of Hanu via the TV by the entrance, and partake in an enchanting and suspenseful story with him! Good luck in there!

t_ch: 既然是「枪火」的试炼…应该能用战斗解决问题吧？希望不会浪费我们太多时间。
t_en: If it's a Gunfire trial... We should be able to settle this with a fight, right? I hope this won't waste too much of our time.

t_ch: 我们这是在…共同操作这位哈努兄弟吗？
t_en: Are we... both in control of this Hanu character?

t_ch: 很好，各位，看来你们很快就上手了！
t_en: Very good! Looks like you've got the hang of it!

t_ch: 在这一集《小小哈努行动》里，石头老板集结了战舰，准备进攻美梦小镇！老苍蝇、狼表哥和炸弹头也蠢蠢欲动…勇敢的哈努兄弟必须击退他们，保护家园！
t_en: In this Hanu's Adventure episode, Boss Stone has gathered his battleships for an assault on Dreamville! Old Buzzfly, Cousin Wolf and Bombhead are all raring to go... The brave Hanu must thwart their advance and protect his home!

t_ch: 然而，现在的哈努兄弟手无寸铁，根本无法对抗恶棍军团。为此哈努兄弟准备寻求「拼图绅士」的帮助，快去找它聊聊吧！
t_en: Alas, Hanu presently is ill-equipped to fend off the Malevolent Mischief Makers, which is why he is preparing to seek out the Puzzle Gentleman's aid. Go forth and speak to him!

t_ch: 哼。
t_en: Hmph.

t_ch: 哼…哼！
t_en: Hmph... Hmph!

t_ch: 你在说什么？
t_en: What are you talking about?

t_ch: 哼？哼。
t_en: Hmph? Hmph.

t_ch: 这么坚持人设吗，兄弟…
t_en: Is staying in character this much REALLY necessary...?

t_ch: 哼…哼。
t_en: Hmph... Hmph.

t_ch: 这题我会！哼。
t_en: Aha, I know the answer for this one! "Hmph."

t_ch: 哼！哼。
t_en: Hmph! Hmph.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼有危险，能让一让吗？
t_en: Penacony's in danger. Can you get out of the way?

t_ch: 是的，虽然听起来很难以置信，但匹诺康尼现在很危险…我们必须去立刻阻止才行。
t_en: I know that this may sound like an exaggeration, but Penacony is actually in danger right now... We have to prevent it at all costs, sooner rather than later.

t_ch: 哼？哼…哼。
t_en: Hmph? Hmph... Hmph.

t_ch: 它这是在…说什么？
t_en: What exactly is he... talking about?

t_ch: 滴答，这时候就要轮到我出场了！
t_en: Tick-tock, it's time for me to make an appearance!

t_ch: 你怎么也在？
t_en: How come you're here too?

t_ch: 你是从哪冒出来的？
t_en: Where did you come from?

t_ch: 流程越来越复杂了，救命…
t_en: Ah, the plot thickens. Help!

t_ch: 钟表小子？我也能看见…这一位是舞台布景吗？
t_en: Clockie? I can also see him... Is this character part of the show?

t_ch: 在美梦小镇，钟表小子可是无处不在、无所不能的！比如…我现在可以担任你的翻译，滴答！
t_en: In Dreamville, Clockie is everywhere and can do anything! Like... right now, I can be your translator, tick-tock!

t_ch: 哼…哼！
t_en: Hmph... Hmph!

t_ch: 哈努兄弟说：「战斗，必须战斗！」
t_en: Hanu says: "Battle, we must do battle!"

t_ch: 哼，哼，哼——
t_en: Hmph, hmph, hmph...

t_ch: 「敌人已经来到家门口，我们没有退路，为了美梦小镇的未来——」
t_en: "The enemy is at our doorstep, and we have no path of retreat. For the future of Dreamville..."
...Hmph!

t_ch: 「——去触碰那台可疑的电视机！」
t_en: "...Touch that suspicious-looking TV right now!"

t_ch: 他们跳进电视机里了……
t_en: So they just jumped inside that TV...

t_ch: 我说…这剧情和台词也太随便了吧……
t_en: Sheesh... The logic in this plot and dialogue is really being pushed to its limits...

t_ch: 恭喜两位选手！过关斩将，证明了自己的实力。但很遗憾…能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有一人。
t_en: Congratulations to both of you! You've overcome all obstacles and proven yourselves. But unfortunately... there is only one who can be Penacony's Festive Superstar.

t_ch: 在最后一关，你们将面对一位守擂至今的选手。一旦失败，将无缘盛会巨星的桂冠！
t_en: In the final stage, you will face the defending champion. If you fail, you will lose the opportunity to become the Festive Superstar!

t_ch: 欢迎来到由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场热砂盛典第三关——「巨星巅峰战」！
t_en: Welcome to the thirty-third Scorchsand Festival's third stage in the twentieth season, sponsored by SoulGlad™ Enterprises — Superstar Showdown!

t_ch: 亲爱的朋友，欢迎光临「钟表匠」构造的美妙世界！在前方等着你们的，是钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子！
t_en: Dear friends, welcome to the wonderful world created by the Watchmaker! Awaiting you up ahead is the titular character from the beloved Clockie animation — Clockie!

t_ch: 据说「钟表匠」早在童年时代便已构想出了它的原型！那时他还只是一位钟表店的学徒，某天夜里，他梦见那些坏掉的钟表全部长出了手脚……
t_en: It's said that the Watchmaker dreamed up the idea of Clockie when he was just a boy. Back then, he was merely an apprentice in a clock shop, and one night, he dreamt that all the broken clocks started sprouting arms and legs.

t_ch: 他如同领航员一样，带领它们走向正确的方向！而作为陪伴许多人长大的经典形象，钟表小子的确影响了一代人，也铸就了「钟表匠」的重要地位！
t_en: Like a skilled navigator, he steered them towards the right path! As a classic figure who grew up with many, Clockie truly shaped a generation, solidifying the Watchmaker's pivotal role in popular culture!

t_ch: 二位选手，祝愿你们与钟表小子共度美好的时光！
t_en: Contestants, may you have a wonderful time with Clockie!

t_ch: 「时间」的试炼…希望不会浪费我们太多时间。
t_en: The trial of Time... I hope it won't waste too much of our time.

t_ch: 难道…我只是个废案吗？
t_en: Am I... just a failed experiment?

t_ch: 所以…我是个可有可无的失败的钟表，对吗？
t_en: ...I'm just an expendable failure of a clock, aren't I?

t_ch: 你好，请让我游玩梦境迷钟。
t_en: Hello, I'd like to play Dream Ticker.

t_ch: 「游玩」…这么说来，我不仅是个失败的钟表，还是个失败的玩具。
t_en: "Play"... So, I'm not just a failed clock, I'm also a failed toy.

t_ch: 这关不会是要我们话疗它吧…
t_en: So, this stage is requiring us to cure this thing with a whole therapy session now?

t_ch: 别傻了，朋友。失败不是一种病，而是一种罪过，罪过是治不好的。
t_en: Don't be naive, buddy. Failure isn't a sickness — it's a sin, and sins can't be cured.

t_ch: 我们有急事…能请你让一下吗？
t_en: We've got an urgent matter to attend to... Can you please let us pass already?

t_ch: 是的，虽然听起来很难以置信，但匹诺康尼现在很危险…我们必须去立刻阻止才行。
t_en: I know that this may sound like an exaggeration, but Penacony is actually in danger right now... We have to prevent it at all costs, sooner rather than later.

t_ch: 哦，又是一组投机取巧的挑战者。很抱歉，虽然我是个失败的钟表，但我也是有底线的。
t_en: Oh, another group of opportunistic challengers. Sorry, though I may be a failure of a clock, I still have my principles.

t_ch: 你们也和其他挑战者一样，想要深入我的内心吗？那就请进吧。但你们不会有任何收获…因为我只是一个失败品。
t_en: You guys are just like the other challengers. You want to enter my inner self? Then please, be my guest. But you won't find anything worthwhile... I'm just a failed piece.

t_ch: 看吧，我的内心早已空无一物了。
t_en: See, I'm just empty inside.

t_ch: 滴答，这时候就要轮到我出场了！
t_en: Tick-tock, it's time for me to make an appearance!

t_ch: 你怎么也在？
t_en: How come you're here too?

t_ch: 你是从哪冒出来的？
t_en: Where did you come from?

t_ch: 流程越来越复杂了，救命…
t_en: Ah, the plot thickens. Help!

t_ch: 钟表小子？我也能看见…这一位是舞台布景吗？
t_en: Clockie? I can also see him... Is this character part of the show?

t_ch: 在美梦小镇，钟表小子可是无处不在、无所不能的！比如…我现在就可以帮你解决这位迷钟朋友的问题，滴答！
t_en: In Dreamville, Clockie is everywhere and can do anything! Like... right now, I could solve this problem with your Big Ticker pal, tick-tock!

t_ch: 竟然是钟表小子本尊，你怎么会无缘无故来看望我这样一个失败的钟表？
t_en: I can't believe it's actually Clockie! Why would you come and visit a failure of a clock like me for no reason?

t_ch: 你看，我们都是钟表，都是一家人！我想帮助你，让你快乐起来！可以告诉我，你的烦恼是什么吗？
t_en: You see, we're all clocks, we're family! I want to help you be happy! Tell your pal Clockie what's troubling you!

t_ch: 我…我昨天才知道一个惊人的事实。他们说，梦境迷钟根本不是钟表小子，只是当年钟表小子的造型废案。
t_en: I... I came across a startling revelation yesterday. Apparently, Dreamscape Ticker isn't the same as Clockie at all. It's just a discarded prototype from Clockie's early development.

t_ch: 让我一个人静静吧，钟表小子。我实在不知道该如何面对你…因为我只是一个失败品。
t_en: Please... just leave me be, Clockie. I just don't know how to face you... because I'm just a failure.

t_ch: 天哪，它的样子太让人伤心了。但没关系，我们可以找回它内心缺失的部分，帮助它从失意中走出来！
t_en: Oh dear, seeing it like this is utterly heart-wrenching. But fear not! We're here to help it rediscover the missing parts of its inner self and guide it out of despair!

t_ch: 啊…原来剧团成员也会陷入存在主义危机啊……
t_en: Ah... I guess even Troupe members can experience existential crises...

t_ch: 别担心，这位姑娘，我已经精准定位到它缺失的零件了！
t_en: Don't worry, miss. I've already pinpointed its missing parts!

t_ch: 这地方真是热闹……
t_en: This place is buzzing...

t_ch: 这就对了！这片海选会场正是那可能性时代的缩影。
t_en: That's right! This venue is a miniature representation of that time known as the era filled with boundless possibilities.

t_ch: 虽然通过了考验，但我们还是快走吧…星核要紧。
t_en: We've passed the test, but we ought to hurry up... The Stellaron is at stake.

t_ch: 总算是胜利了…我们赶紧去下一关吧。
t_en: Looks like we won... Let's hurry up and get to the next stage.

t_ch: 准备好了吗？一，二，三……
t_en: Ready? One, two, three...

t_ch: 哦，勇敢的哈努兄弟…你看起来需要帮助，呵呵。
t_en: Oh, brave Hanu... You look like you could really use some help.

t_ch: 我们要小心，别被那群怪物发现了。
t_en: Let's stay alert and make sure those monsters don't spot us.

t_ch: 你看上面…如果把那个东西推下来，是不是就能搞定它了？
t_en: Look up there... If we can push that thing down, do you think that would do the trick?

t_ch: 终于集齐拼图了…快回去吧。
t_en: Finally, that's all the jigsaw pieces... Let's hurry back.

t_ch: 一下子切断连接，还有点不适应……
t_en: Disconnecting from that thing so suddenly has left me feeling slightly disoriented.

t_ch: 那是…哈努兄弟？
t_en: Is that... Hanu?

t_ch: 那我们就再来一次吧…准备好了吗？
t_en: Well, here we go again... Ready?

t_ch: 储藏室…就在置物架后边吧？
t_en: The storage room... It's behind the shelves, right?

t_ch: 竟然真的有一支火箭筒。
t_en: He wasn't lying. There's actually a bazooka here.

t_ch: 现在…我们应该有办法对付那些坏蛋了。
t_en: Now... we should have a way of dealing with those baddies.

t_ch: 这个击发手感简直和「飞蝗Ⅱ型」一模一样……
t_en: This thing feels just like the Soaring Locust II...

t_ch: 小心，更多怪物进来了！准备开火！
t_en: Careful, looks like we've got more company! Get ready to fire!

t_ch: 又来…但没关系，我们已经完全习惯这支火箭筒了。
t_en: Here we go again... but no big deal, we're pretty handy with this bazooka now.

t_ch: 应该都搞定了吧？
t_en: That should be all of them, right?

t_ch: 天哪，哈努兄弟简直所向披靡！各位，关卡完成，快通过电视机前往下一关吧！
t_en: Oh my! Hanu is on a streak! Everyone, the stage is complete, quickly head through the TV to the next stage!

t_ch: 天哪，无敌的哈努兄弟居然被发现了！各位，千万要小心行事！
t_en: Oh my, the unstoppable Hanu has been spotted! Everyone, please proceed with caution!

t_ch: 天哪，无敌的哈努兄弟居然倒下了！各位，快快回到战场，向恶棍们复仇吧！
t_en: Oh no, the not-so-unstoppable Hanu has actually fallen! Quickly, return to the battlefield and seek revenge against the bad guys!

t_ch: 难道…我只是个废案吗？
t_en: Am I... just a failed experiment?

t_ch: 那座雕像…是不是说话了？
t_en: That statue... Did it just speak?

t_ch: 这边，朋友们！拿出仓鼠球骑士的速度吧！
t_en: Over here, my friends! Better be fast like Hamster Ball Knight!

t_ch: 这一定就是迷钟内心缺失的零件，太好了！
t_en: This must be one of the missing parts that Big Ticker needs. That's great!

t_ch: 拿到了美梦剧团的内心碎片…这种事也太梦幻了。
t_en: An inner self fragment belonging to the Sweet Dreams Troupe... This is just too surreal.

t_ch: 救救，救救啾！要变成烤全鸟了啾！
t_en: Help, help, tweet! I'm about to end up as a roast dinner, tweet!

t_ch: 滴答！是不是有什么人在求救？
t_en: Tick-tock! Do I hear someone calling out for help?

t_ch: 我们已经集齐全部零件了…快回去吧，别让那位迷钟等急了。
t_en: We've gathered all the missing parts... Let's hurry back, we don't want to keep Big Ticker waiting.

t_ch: 全都搞定了…胜利在望，我们出发前往最后的关卡吧。
t_en: It's all done... Victory is in sight. Let's head to the final stage.

t_ch: 滴答！灰色的朋友，我们还没帮那位迷钟打开心结呢！
t_en: Tick-tock! Hey there my gray-haired friend, we still haven't helped Big Ticker find closure yet!

t_ch: （不会吧，我好像看见了什么…非常不得了的人物。）
t_en: (No way. I think I just saw someone... someone extraordinary)

t_ch: 既然这样…我们就向终点进发吧。
t_en: In that case... let's make our way to the end.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼，还真是人才济济啊…希望我们还来得及。
t_en: Penacony's really thronging with talent... I hope we make it in time.

t_ch: 恭喜{NICKNAME}和流萤获得本次热砂盛典的冠军！
t_en: Congratulations to {NICKNAME} and Firefly on becoming this Scorchsand Festival's champions!

t_ch: 让我们期待{F#她们}{M#他们}在谐乐大典上的精彩亮相！
t_en: We look forward to their amazing entrance in the Charmony Festival!

t_ch: 把最热烈的掌声，献给两位年轻有为的来宾吧！
t_en: Let's give a round of applause to our aspiring young guests!

t_ch: 谢谢你，钟表小子…如果不是你，我永远也无法像这样好好地和人交流——是你帮助我重新认识了我自己！
t_en: Thank you, Clockie... If not for you, I'd never be able to connect with people like this — you helped me find myself again!

t_ch: 不客气，身为美梦小镇的守护者，这是我应该做的！
t_en: No problem at all! As the guardian of Dreamville, it's what I'm here for! Tick-tock!

t_ch: 两位朋友，你们还有重要的事要做，对吧？
t_en: My friends, you still have other important things to do, right?

t_ch: 前进吧，朋友们——等那个时刻到来，我和所有迷钟都会为你们加油的！
t_en: Go forth, my friends — when the moment comes, all the Dream Tickers and I will cheer for you!

t_ch: 且慢！{M#英俊的先生，俏美的小姐}{F#两位俏美的小姐}——
t_en: Please wait! {M#Handsome gentleman, beautiful miss}{F#My beautiful ladies}...

t_ch: 「纯美」荣光在上，没想到我们竟再次见面了。二位温暖的面庞在这燥动的时刻仿若春风，照拂着我热砂般的心！
t_en: By the glorious light of Beauty! I never thought I would see you again. In such turbulent times, your kind faces are as spring's gentle breeze, bringing solace to my scorched heart!

t_ch: 你难道是…纯美骑士？
t_en: Are you... a Knight of Beauty?

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Ahhhwww?

t_ch: 听哪！玫瑰色的「纯美」已让各位哑口无言——多么荣幸！
t_en: Hear ye! The rosy glow of the Beauty has rendered you speechless — what an honor!

t_ch: 原来那位红发选手是你？！
t_en: So the red-haired contestant was you all along!

t_ch: 您竟然已在别处探听到了我卑微的称号…不胜荣幸！
t_en: You've already heard of my humble title elsewhere? I am deeply honored!

t_ch: 你也来参加谐乐大典吗？
t_en: Will you be participating in the Charmony Festival as well?

t_ch: 我获悉庆典召开在即，便让「希世难得号」开足马力，将我引领至匹诺康尼。然而没有「纯美」看顾的银河举世混浊，我在前来途中为救死扶伤耽搁许久……
t_en: Upon hearing of the impending festivities, I commanded the One and Only to bring me to Penacony with full haste. Alas, in a cosmos unguarded by the Beauty, disorder prevails, thus my passage was delayed by tending to the sick and injured...

t_ch: 好在侏儒兔机甲驾驶员、流浪的猫咪决斗家、银河忍者、四驱智械等三十二位落难者全都渡过难关，安然无恙…我便将大家一齐带领至此，与万千美丽的生灵同享谐乐。
t_en: Fortunately, the Mini Rabbit Mech Pilot, Stray Cat Duelist, Galactic Ninja, and Quad-drive Intellitron, along with thirty-two other souls in distress, all emerged from their predicaments safe and sound... I then led them all here to revel in the harmony with the countless other splendid beings.

t_ch: 这就是「纯美」吗？太耀眼了…
t_en: Is this the Beauty? It's dazzling...

t_ch: 不敢当！只可惜那位如孔雀般华美耀眼的公司使节状况依旧欠佳…多希望他也能一道共襄盛举啊。
t_en: I do not deserve such praise! Unfortunately, that dashing IPC Ambassador, whose radiance matches that of a beautiful peacock, remains in a woeful state... How I wish he too could partake in this splendid occasion.

t_ch: 好了，让我们说回正题吧。既然相聚于此，想必两位也一定是为了争夺海选冠军而来，对吧？
t_en: Okay, let's get back to business. Since fate has brought us together, it stands to reason that you both seek the accolade of the audition's victor, correct?

t_ch: 你小子还挺能救…
t_en: You're quite the savior, aren't ya...

t_ch: 不敢当！只可惜那位如孔雀般华美耀眼的公司使节状况依旧欠佳…多希望他也能一道共襄盛举啊。
t_en: I do not deserve such praise! Unfortunately, that dashing IPC Ambassador, whose radiance matches that of a beautiful peacock, remains in a woeful state... How I wish he too could partake in this splendid occasion.

t_ch: 好了，让我们说回正题吧。既然相聚于此，想必两位也一定是为了争夺海选冠军而来，对吧？
t_en: Okay, let's get back to business. Since fate has brought us together, it stands to reason that you both seek the accolade of the audition's victor, correct?

t_ch: 我忙着拯救世界，能让一让吗？
t_en: I'm busy saving the world. Could you please make way?

t_ch: 拯救世界？多么「纯美」的义举！既然如此……
t_en: Saving the world? What a righteous act of Beauty! If that's the case...

t_ch: …不，不行。海选规则亦神圣不可侵犯，一如「纯美」本身。
t_en: ...No, that won't do. The rules of the contest are sacred and inviolable, just like the Beauty.

t_ch: 唔…究竟要如何抉择才好……
t_en: Hmm... What would be the noblest choice...?

t_ch: 我们必须封印匹诺康尼的星核。
t_en: We need to seal the Stellaron on Penacony.

t_ch: 没错，这座富丽堂皇的美梦就建立在星核和无数人的牺牲之上。
t_en: That's right. This magnificent dream is built upon the Stellaron and the countless sacrifices of many people.

t_ch: 哦？竟然还有如此令人发指的暴行……
t_en: Oh? To encounter deeds so vile they stir one's very soul...

t_ch: 可如今的匹诺康尼一点也看不到星核污染的迹象，家族也向来以播撒和谐闻名…我该如何确信你们所言非虚？
t_en: However, present-day Penacony bears no marks of the Stellaron's taint and The Family has always been renowned for spreading Harmony... How can I be sure your words hold truth?

t_ch: 告知「钟表匠」和星核的真相。
t_en: Tell the truth about the Watchmaker and the Stellaron.

t_ch: 如果我没猜错，纯美骑士团应该也收到了「钟表匠」的邀请函，对吧？
t_en: If I'm not wrong, the Knights of Beauty also received an invitation from the Watchmaker, right?

t_ch: 正是。不过这又和星核有什么联系？
t_en: That's right. But what does this have to do with the Stellaron?

t_ch: 其实，我们已经见过「钟表匠」了……
t_en: Actually, we've already met the Watchmaker...

t_ch: 你们将有关「钟表匠」和匹诺康尼星核的一切真相告给了银枝……
t_en: You revealed to Argenti all the truths about the Watchmaker and the Penacony Stellaron...
Hmm...

t_ch: 我明白了，看来各位果真在为「纯美」之道四处奔走。
t_en: It's clear to me now. Evidently, you are traveling in pursuit of the Beauty's ideals.

t_ch: 去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们！我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。
t_en: Go forth, my dear friend, beautiful miss, the audition's crown is yours to claim! I shall remain here, gazing from afar as you bask in the limelight, joining the audience in offering you the most heartfelt cheers and applause.

t_ch: 谢谢你，纯美骑士！我们的时间已经不多了…有缘再见。
t_en: Thank you, Knight of Beauty! We don't have much time left... May we meet again.

t_ch: 你还信不过你挚友吗！
t_en: You don't trust your dear friend!?
Hmm...

t_ch: 抱歉了，我的挚友。如果你们不能拿出令人心悦诚服的证据，我便绝不能退让，以免辱没纯美骑士之名。
t_en: Forgive me, my dear friends. If you cannot present irrefutable evidence, I must not yield, lest I dishonor the name of the Knights of Beauty.

t_ch: 但倘若你所言确实非虚…「纯美」在上，我们就借这场命中注定的对决检验你的能力吧！
t_en: But if what you say is true... In the name of Beauty, let us use this fated duel to test your mettle!

t_ch: 求求你了，我说的都是真的！
t_en: I'm begging you, all I speak is the truth!
Hmm...

t_ch: 抱歉了，我的挚友。如果你们不能拿出令人心悦诚服的证据，我便绝不能退让，以免辱没纯美骑士之名。
t_en: Forgive me, my dear friends. If you cannot present irrefutable evidence, I must not yield, lest I dishonor the name of the Knights of Beauty.

t_ch: 但倘若你所言确实非虚…「纯美」在上，我们就借这场命中注定的对决检验你的能力吧！
t_en: But if what you say is true... In the name of Beauty, let us use this fated duel to test your mettle!

t_ch: 虽然抵达后我一度因不善言辞而被当作身材高大、身着银铠、如烈焰般火红而炽热的通缉犯…但无妨，这一切都是来自梦想之地的「纯美」历练。
t_en: Though upon arrival, I was once mistaken for a towering, silver-armored fugitive with fiery red flames, due to my lack of eloquence... it matters not, for all these trials stem from the Land of Dream's Beauty.

t_ch: 重要的是，此身如今已立于此处——狭路相逢，我，「纯美骑士团」的银枝，恳求与二位展开一场骑士道的较量！
t_en: What matters is that I now stand before you — our paths have crossed. I, Argenti of the Knights of Beauty, am humbly requesting for a battle with you both in the name of the Code of Chivalry!

t_ch: 如果我有幸得胜，就请各位为我让出通向桂冠的阶梯，还要承认——
t_en: If I am fortunate enough to emerge victorious, kindly grant me passage to the crown of victory and recognize that...

t_ch: ——纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
t_en: ...Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!

t_ch: 漂亮！漂亮！真是一场精彩的对决！是各位让我明白，为了捍卫伊德莉拉的美名，我还需多加砥砺精进…多么美丽的教训！
t_en: Beautiful! Beautiful! Truly a captivating contest! It is through you that I realize, to uphold the honor of Idrila, I must further hone my skills... What a beautiful lesson indeed!

t_ch: 去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们……
t_en: Go forth, my dear friend, beautiful miss, the audition's crown is yours to claim...

t_ch: 我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。
t_en: I shall remain here, gazing from afar as you bask in the limelight, joining the audience in offering you the most heartfelt cheers and applause.

t_ch: 我们的时间已经不多了…有缘再见，纯美的骑士。
t_en: We don't have much time... May fate allow us to meet again, Knight of Beauty.

t_ch: 恭喜二位成为此次谐乐大典的盛会巨星，在进入大剧院前……
t_en: Congratulations to the both of you on becoming the Festive Superstars of this year's Charmony Festival. Before entering the Grand Theater...

t_ch: 我谨代表主办方向你致以诚挚祝贺，愿你在祂的光芒下得享喜乐。
t_en: I, on behalf of the organizers, extend my sincere congratulations to you, wishing you joy under THEIR radiance.

t_ch: 你怎么在这里？
t_en: What are you doing here?

t_ch: 你已经和梦主谈妥了吗？
t_en: You already worked things out with the Dreammaster?

t_ch: 只有「诚挚祝贺」？我星琼呢？
t_en: All I get are "sincere congratulations"? Where are my Stellar Jades?

t_ch: 各位的努力确实配得上更多奖励，我也如是做了准备。只是这奖励并非物质…而是一次彼此开诚布公的机会。
t_en: *laughs* Your endeavors are worthy of extra recognition, and I've taken steps to ensure that. However, this reward is not a material one... but rather the opportunity for an open and honest communication between us.

t_ch: 正如之前所承诺的，我、家妹及瓦尔特先生已面见了梦主，向他就匹诺康尼与星核的真相展开了深入讨论，并且达成了共识——
t_en: As previously promised, my sister, Mr. Yang, and I have met with the Dreammaster. We delved into the truth about Penacony and its Stellaron, and have come to a consensus—

t_ch: ——我和橡木家系全体，无法同意各位的要求。
t_en: Both I and the Oak Family cannot acquiesce to your request.

t_ch: …不出所料。
t_en: ...Just as expected.

t_ch: 我们认同各位无名客的观点，匹诺康尼需要改变，但绝不是以你们要求的方式。盛会之星绝不能、也绝不会变回混乱无序、弱肉强食的逐梦之地。
t_en: We acknowledge the perspective of you Nameless — Penacony does require change, but not as you propose. The Planet of Festivities cannot and will not revert to a place characterized by chaos, disorder, or anarchy.

t_ch: 一路过关斩将，你应该或多或少感受到了那个时代的缩影：弱势者被无情淘汰，平等荡然无存。在残酷的竞争中，人们朝不保夕，艰难度日……
t_en: Through your journey of overcoming obstacles, you must have glimpsed the essence of that era: The vulnerable ruthlessly eliminated, equality non-existent, commonfolk living precarious lives, eking out a dreary existence...

t_ch: 最后，只有像各位这样的「英雄」才能获得成功。
t_en: Ultimately, only "heroes" like yourselves manage to achieve success.

t_ch: 但试问——{NICKNAME}，如果你没有星核赋予的特殊身份，你只是芸芸众生中脆弱的一员…你会更喜欢哪一种匹诺康尼？
t_en: But I would dare ask: {NICKNAME}, if you did not possess the special status of having a Stellaron, and you were but an anonymous and frail member among the masses... Which Penacony would you prefer?

t_ch: 适者生存的蛮荒之地，还是人人得以幸福的美梦乐园？
t_en: A dystopia for the survival of the fittest, or a Sweetdream Paradise for all?

t_ch: 适者生存没什么不好…
t_en: There's nothing wrong with being the fittest...

t_ch: 美梦乐园确实不错…
t_en: A Sweetdream Paradise doesn't sound too bad...

t_ch: 我不知道，问这个干嘛？
t_en: I don't know. Why're you asking me?

t_ch: 这不是重点！{NICKNAME}，别被他绕进去了。
t_en: That's not the point! {NICKNAME}, don't let him mislead you.

t_ch: 星期日先生，就算橡木家系的诸位不能完全同意有关星核的安排，现在恐怕也不是对匹诺康尼的过去和未来高谈阔论的时候吧？
t_en: Mr. Sunday, even if the members of the Oak Family can't fully agree on what to do about the Stellaron, now's not exactly the time to be holding an extensive discourse about Penacony's past and future, is it?

t_ch: 星核问题关乎匹诺康尼所有人的生死存亡。如果各位有更好的提案，列车组愿意洗耳恭听。不妨一五一十地告诉我们那场会谈的来龙去脉吧——
t_en: The Stellaron issue concerns the life and death of everyone on Penacony. If anyone has a better suggestion, the Crew is more than willing to listen. Also, it'd be best to tell us the ins and outs of that meeting—

t_ch: ——这样我们也好知道，瓦尔特和知更鸟小姐究竟遭遇了什么，才没能如约而至。
t_en: ...This way, we'll at least know what Welt and Miss Robin are dealing with, and the reason why they failed to make our appointment.

t_ch: 呵，领航员，我正有此意。既然人已到齐，我们就从那场会谈讲起吧。
t_en: Ah, Navigator, that is precisely my intention. With all present, let's begin by discussing the details of that meeting.

t_ch: 聊聊我们的困境和选择，我们各自的理想和信念……
t_en: Let's talk about our tribulations and choices, our ideals and beliefs...

t_ch: 还有我们最终应行的、唯一的道路。
t_en: And our final course of action, the only path to take.

t_ch: 预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
t_en: I wish you a successful performance!

t_ch: 两位的台词功底真是无比深厚！预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
t_en: The depth of your dialogue delivery is remarkable! Best of luck with your results!

t_ch: 二位有着卓越的表演才能，预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
t_en: Both of you possess excellent performative talent. I wish you all the best!

t_ch: 你们的表演远未达到令我满意的程度！
t_en: Your performance is far from satisfactory!

t_ch: 枯燥的台词，僵硬的动作…远远谈不上「表演」二字！
t_en: Dull lines, stiff movements... this can scarcely be described as acting!

t_ch: 多么动人的表情……
t_en: The expressiveness, the emotion, so touching...

t_ch: <size=36>卡！！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>CUT!</size>

t_ch: 咦？我们还什么都没做……
t_en: Huh? We haven't even done anything...

t_ch: 太…太感动了，你们的表演甚至超越了原作！简直…简直…简直就——
t_en: It's so... so touching, your portrayal outdoes the original! It's simply... simply... simply —

t_ch: <size=36>不像演的！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Beautiful!</size>

t_ch: 许多演员靠煽情感动他人，但你们却表演出了欲语泪先流的悲伤，甚至让我想起了从前……
t_en: Many actors depend on emotions to move people, but your performance depicted a grief so profound it brings tears to one's eyes... and even reminds me of my past...

t_ch: 最高分通过！
t_en: You pass with full marks!

t_ch: 多么精妙的表演，几乎激起了我的愤慨之情！
t_en: A most magnificent performance that seemed to invoke feelings of rage within me!

t_ch: <size=36>卡！！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>CUT!</size>

t_ch: 一个白手起家的富豪，竟然用如此轻蔑的态度对待自己曾经的同伴，使我心中不由得感到愤怒！
t_en: A mogul who went from rags-to-riches treating a former companion with such disdain — it just makes my blood boil!

t_ch: 咦？我们还什么都没做…她也太能脑补了吧？
t_en: Huh? But we haven't even done anything... Is her imagination running wild again?

t_ch: 你们的表演甚至超过了原作！简直…简直…简直就——
t_en: Brilliant! Your portrayal outdoes the original! It's simply... simply... simply —

t_ch: <size=36>不像演的！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Beautiful!</size>

t_ch: 一个白手起家的富豪，竟然用如此轻蔑的态度对待自己曾经的同伴，使我心中不由得感到愤怒！
t_en: A mogul who went from rags-to-riches treating a former companion with such disdain — it just makes my blood boil!

t_ch: 最高分通过！
t_en: You pass with full marks!

t_ch: 噢，多么令人温暖的结局啊！
t_en: Oh, such a warm and fuzzy ending!

t_ch: <size=36>卡！！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>CUT!</size>

t_ch: 我怎么也没有想到，一个如此悲伤的场景，竟会被你们演绎得这么愉快和温馨。两人依然如同往时般友好，仿佛时间和地位对他们不值一提！
t_en: I never imagined that such a sad scene could be portrayed by you two in such a joyful and heartwarming way — two people sharing a long-cherished friendship, as if time and status meant nothing to them!

t_ch: 咦？我们还什么都没做…她也太能脑补了吧？
t_en: Huh? But we haven't even done anything... Is her imagination running wild again?

t_ch: 你们的表演甚至超过了原作！简直…简直…简直就——
t_en: Brilliant! Your portrayal outdoes the original! It's simply... simply... simply —

t_ch: <size=36>不像演的！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Beautiful!</size>

t_ch: 两人依然如同往时般友好，仿佛时间和地位对他们不值一提！看到这样的结局，我心里也充满了希望。
t_en: Two people sharing a long-cherished friendship, as if time and status meant nothing to them! My heart brims with hope at the sight of such an ending.

t_ch: 最高分通过！
t_en: You pass with full marks!

t_ch: 别走太远，评委在盯着我们呢……
t_en: Don't wander off, the judge is still watching us...

s_ch: 被迫扮演怪物的气泡锂犬
s_en: Bubble Hound who's been forced to play a monster
t_ch: 苏乐达™…我的苏乐达™…汪……
t_en: SoulGlad™... My SoulGlad™... Raawrr...

t_ch: 还算轻松…希望这样的考验不会持续太久。
t_en: Pretty simple... I just hope these tests don't take too long.

s_ch: 被迫扮演怪物的甜猿泰山
s_en: Sweet Gorilla who's been forced to play a monster
t_ch: 世界以痛吻我，我报之以苏乐达™…呜喳喳喳……
t_en: The world kisses me with pain, and I provide with SoulGlad™ in return... Whoosh...

s_ch: 被迫扮演怪物的十七分熟弟弟
s_en: Lil' Beyond Overcooked Forced to Play Monster
t_ch: 嘎呜…身可死，苏乐达™之名不可弃……
t_en: Grawwrr... The body withers, but the SoulGlad™ name shall not...

s_ch: 被迫扮演怪物的十七分熟哥哥
s_en: Big Beyond Overcooked Forced to Play Monster
t_ch: 嘎呜…如果你是龙…也好……
t_en: Grawwrr... You truly are a beast, more than I can ever be...

t_ch: 这样应该就都搞定了…走吧，瓦尔特先生还在等我们。
t_en: That should do it... Okay, let's go. Mr. Yang is waiting for us.

t_ch: 看来，以我们现在的样子是上不了楼梯的……
t_en: It appears we can't climb the stairs in our current state...

t_ch: 哦！这严丝合缝的畅快感…我的强迫症被完美地治愈了！呵呵……
t_en: Oh my! The exquisite sensation of perfect alignment... My organizational itch has been quite thoroughly scratched!

t_ch: 快去吧，哈努兄弟！触碰那台电视机。变回你原来的样子。然后上楼去吧，你的武器就在那里等你！
t_en: Hurry now, Hanu! Touch that TV set and transform back into your old self. Then, head upstairs — your weapon awaits you there!

t_ch: 这么随便的引导真的没问题吗……
t_en: Are such haphazard instructions really okay...

t_ch: 已经渐渐习惯这种感觉了…说不定还能操作哈努兄弟做些高难度动作呢。
t_en: I am gradually getting used to this... who knows, I might even be able to perform some high-level moves with Hanu.

t_ch: 哦？刚才是不是有人提到了「高难度动作」？没错，朋友！接下来的剧情正好充满了各种高难度动作！
t_en: Oh? Did someone say "high-level moves" just now? That's right, pal! The upcoming script is just exploding with all sorts of high-level shenanigans!

t_ch: 上回书说到，哈努兄弟做好了战斗准备。就在这时，他听见走廊外传来了沉重的脚步声。果然，恶棍军团的喽啰们已经闯入了哈努兄弟的宅邸！
t_en: Last we saw, Hanu was preparing for battle. Suddenly, he hears heavy footsteps coming from the hallway. The Malevolent Mischief Makers have broken into his home!

t_ch: 勇敢的哈努兄弟绝不会束手就擒！他立刻奔向储藏室，准备与坏蛋们决一死战……
t_en: But brave Hanu won't go down without a fight! He instantly sprints for the storage room, ready for a do-or-die showdown against the baddies...

t_ch: 可是…我们现在还是没有趁手的武器……
t_en: But... we still don't have any weapons in hand...

t_ch: 你知道吗？哈努兄弟心爱的火箭筒恰好就在那间储藏室里，快去吧！
t_en: Guess what? Hanu's favorite bazooka just so happens to be in that storage room! So get a move on!

t_ch: 还真是方便的流程啊…要是主办方允许穿装甲参赛就更好了。
t_en: What a coincidentally convenient plot twist... It'd be even more awesome if the organizers allowed me to wear armor.

t_ch: 终于结束了。不过，这支火箭筒的手感好好，有点舍不得……
t_en: Well, that's that. But it is gonna be hard to let go of this bazooka...

t_ch: …呃，不是，没什么。我们赶紧去下一关吧。
t_en: ...Uhm, nevermind. Let's hurry over to the next stage.

t_ch: 让我一个人静静吧，钟表小子。我实在不知道该如何面对你…因为我只是一个失败品。
t_en: Please... just leave me be, Clockie. I just don't know how to face you... because I'm just a failure.

t_ch: 我们到了！缺失的零件就在对面…可是要怎样才能过去？
t_en: We're here! There's a missing part on the opposite side... But how do we get over there?

t_ch: 这里也有筑梦师们留下的「筑梦遥眼」…时间紧迫，有需要就直接用吧。
t_en: There's also a "Dream's Eye" left here by a Dreamweaver... We're running out of time, we'll have to use it if necessary.

t_ch: 啾！救救，救救啾！这家伙的身体也太烫了啾！
t_en: Tweet! Help, help help, tweet! This fella's body is boiling hot, tweet!

t_ch: 有人吗啾？我要坚持不住了啾！
t_en: Is anyone there, tweet? I can't take it anymore, tweet!

t_ch: 天哪，是一只折纸小鸟！它怎么钻进十七分熟的尾巴里了？
t_en: Oh dear, it's an origami bird! What's it doing in Beyond Overcooked's tail?

t_ch: 是钟表小子啾？快救救我啾，要变成烤全鸟了啾！
t_en: Is that Clockie, tweet? Please save me, tweet! I'm being roasted alive, tweet!

t_ch: 烤全鸟！这可真是太糟糕了——我们赶紧救它出来吧！
t_en: A roasted bird! This is horrible — let's save it, quickly!

t_ch: 呼…谢谢你们啾，我感觉自己差不多已经七分熟了啾。
t_en: Phew... thank you guys, tweet. I feel I'm about seventy percent cooked, tweet!

t_ch: 还好你没事！可你怎么会钻进那家伙的尾巴里？
t_en: Thank goodness you're ok! But why did you burrow yourself into that fella's tail?

t_ch: 这是因为那家伙偷走了迷钟先生的零件啾！我想帮它拿回来，结果不小心把自己送进烤炉了啾…你们拿去吧，小心烫手啾！
t_en: Because that fella stole one of Mr. Big Ticker's parts, tweet! I wanted to help retrieve it, but I accidentally got myself stuck in the oven, tweet... Go ahead and get it, but be careful, it's hot, tweet!

t_ch: 天哪…这是怎么回事？你的内心十分混乱！
t_en: Oh dear... What's going on in here? Your inner self is a mess!

t_ch: 我…没有资格成为真正的你。还是放弃吧，钟表小子！
t_en: I'm not qualified to be the real Clockie. Just give up, Clockie!

t_ch: 噢，不！这可不行，你必须直面自己内心的恐惧！
t_en: Hmph, no! This is unacceptable. You have to face your fears!

t_ch: 事已至此，只好使用「钟表把戏」了——
t_en: Since it's come down to this, I'll have to use Clockwork...

t_ch: 锵锵——成功了！
t_en: Ta-dah, success!

t_ch: 前进吧，朋友们——等那个时刻到来，我和所有迷钟都会为你们加油的！
t_en: Go forth, my friends — when the moment comes, all the Dream Tickers and I will cheer for you!

t_ch: 去吧！冠军的舞台属于二位…享用你们赢得的荣光！
t_en: Go forth! The champion's stage belongs to the both of you... Bask in the glory you deserve!

t_ch: 难道…我只是个废案吗？
t_en: Am I... just a failed experiment?

t_ch: 我们回来了！只要有这些，你一定能够打开心结，滴答！
t_en: We're back! As long as you have these, you'll be able to find closure, tick-tock!

t_ch: 且慢！{M#英俊的先生，俏美的小姐}{F#两位俏美的小姐}——
t_en: Please wait! {M#Handsome gentleman, beautiful miss}{F#My beautiful ladies}...

t_ch: 「纯美」荣光在上，没想到我们竟再次见面了。二位温暖的面庞在这燥动的时刻仿若春风，照拂着我热砂般的心！
t_en: By the glorious light of Beauty! I never thought I would see you again. In such turbulent times, your kind faces are as spring's gentle breeze, bringing solace to my scorched heart!

t_ch: 你难道是…纯美骑士？
t_en: Are you... a Knight of Beauty?

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Ahhhwww?

t_ch: 听哪！玫瑰色的「纯美」已让各位哑口无言——多么荣幸！
t_en: Hear ye! The rosy glow of the Beauty has rendered you speechless — what an honor!

t_ch: 原来那位红发选手是你？！
t_en: So the red-haired contestant was you all along!

t_ch: 您竟然已在别处探听到了我卑微的称号…不胜荣幸！
t_en: You've already heard of my humble title elsewhere? I am deeply honored!

t_ch: 你也来参加谐乐大典吗？
t_en: Will you be participating in the Charmony Festival as well?

t_ch: 我获悉庆典召开在即，便让「希世难得号」开足马力，将我引领至匹诺康尼。然而没有「纯美」看顾的银河举世混浊，我在前来途中为救死扶伤耽搁许久……
t_en: Upon hearing of the impending festivities, I commanded the One and Only to bring me to Penacony with full haste. Alas, in a cosmos unguarded by the Beauty, disorder prevails, thus my passage was delayed by tending to the sick and injured...

t_ch: 好在侏儒兔机甲驾驶员、流浪的猫咪决斗家、银河忍者、四驱智械等三十二位落难者全都渡过难关，安然无恙…我便将大家一齐带领至此，与万千美丽的生灵同享谐乐。
t_en: Fortunately, the Mini Rabbit Mech Pilot, Stray Cat Duelist, Galactic Ninja, and Quad-drive Intellitron, along with thirty-two other souls in distress, all emerged from their predicaments safe and sound... I then led them all here to revel in the harmony with the countless other splendid beings.

t_ch: 这就是「纯美」吗？太耀眼了…
t_en: Is this the Beauty? It's dazzling...

t_ch: 不敢当！只可惜那位如孔雀般华美耀眼的公司使节状况依旧欠佳…多希望他也能一道共襄盛举啊。
t_en: I do not deserve such praise! Unfortunately, that dashing IPC Ambassador, whose radiance matches that of a beautiful peacock, remains in a woeful state... How I wish he too could partake in this splendid occasion.

t_ch: 好了，让我们说回正题吧。既然相聚于此，想必两位也一定是为了争夺海选冠军而来，对吧？
t_en: Okay, let's get back to business. Since fate has brought us together, it stands to reason that you both seek the accolade of the audition's victor, correct?

t_ch: 你小子还挺能救…
t_en: You're quite the savior, aren't ya...

t_ch: 不敢当！只可惜那位如孔雀般华美耀眼的公司使节状况依旧欠佳…多希望他也能一道共襄盛举啊。
t_en: I do not deserve such praise! Unfortunately, that dashing IPC Ambassador, whose radiance matches that of a beautiful peacock, remains in a woeful state... How I wish he too could partake in this splendid occasion.

t_ch: 好了，让我们说回正题吧。既然相聚于此，想必两位也一定是为了争夺海选冠军而来，对吧？
t_en: Okay, let's get back to business. Since fate has brought us together, it stands to reason that you both seek the accolade of the audition's victor, correct?

t_ch: 我忙着拯救世界，能让一让吗？
t_en: I'm busy saving the world. Could you please make way?

t_ch: 拯救世界？多么「纯美」的义举！既然如此……
t_en: Saving the world? What a righteous act of Beauty! If that's the case...

t_ch: …不，不行。海选规则亦神圣不可侵犯，一如「纯美」本身。
t_en: ...No, that won't do. The rules of the contest are sacred and inviolable, just like the Beauty.

t_ch: 唔…究竟要如何抉择才好……
t_en: Hmm... What would be the noblest choice...?

t_ch: 我们必须封印匹诺康尼的星核。
t_en: We need to seal the Stellaron on Penacony.

t_ch: 没错，这座富丽堂皇的美梦就建立在星核和无数人的牺牲之上。
t_en: That's right. This magnificent dream is built upon the Stellaron and the countless sacrifices of many people.

t_ch: 哦？竟然还有如此令人发指的暴行……
t_en: Oh? To encounter deeds so vile they stir one's very soul...

t_ch: 可如今的匹诺康尼一点也看不到星核污染的迹象，家族也向来以播撒和谐闻名…我该如何确信你们所言非虚？
t_en: However, present-day Penacony bears no marks of the Stellaron's taint and The Family has always been renowned for spreading Harmony... How can I be sure your words hold truth?

t_ch: 告知「钟表匠」和星核的真相。
t_en: Tell the truth about the Watchmaker and the Stellaron.

t_ch: 如果我没猜错，纯美骑士团应该也收到了「钟表匠」的邀请函，对吧？
t_en: If I'm not wrong, the Knights of Beauty also received an invitation from the Watchmaker, right?

t_ch: 正是。不过这又和星核有什么联系？
t_en: That's right. But what does this have to do with the Stellaron?

t_ch: 其实，我们已经见过「钟表匠」了……
t_en: Actually, we've already met the Watchmaker...

t_ch: 你们将有关「钟表匠」和匹诺康尼星核的一切真相告给了银枝……
t_en: You revealed to Argenti all the truths about the Watchmaker and the Penacony Stellaron...
Hmm...

t_ch: 我明白了，看来各位果真在为「纯美」之道四处奔走。
t_en: It's clear to me now. Evidently, you are traveling in pursuit of the Beauty's ideals.

t_ch: 去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们！我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。
t_en: Go forth, my dear friend, beautiful miss, the audition's crown is yours to claim! I shall remain here, gazing from afar as you bask in the limelight, joining the audience in offering you the most heartfelt cheers and applause.

t_ch: 谢谢你，纯美骑士！我们的时间已经不多了…有缘再见。
t_en: Thank you, Knight of Beauty! We don't have much time left... May we meet again.

t_ch: 你还信不过你挚友吗！
t_en: You don't trust your dear friend!?
Hmm...

t_ch: 抱歉了，我的挚友。如果你们不能拿出令人心悦诚服的证据，我便绝不能退让，以免辱没纯美骑士之名。
t_en: Forgive me, my dear friends. If you cannot present irrefutable evidence, I must not yield, lest I dishonor the name of the Knights of Beauty.

t_ch: 但倘若你所言确实非虚…「纯美」在上，我们就借这场命中注定的对决检验你的能力吧！
t_en: But if what you say is true... In the name of Beauty, let us use this fated duel to test your mettle!

t_ch: 求求你了，我说的都是真的！
t_en: I'm begging you, all I speak is the truth!
Hmm...

t_ch: 抱歉了，我的挚友。如果你们不能拿出令人心悦诚服的证据，我便绝不能退让，以免辱没纯美骑士之名。
t_en: Forgive me, my dear friends. If you cannot present irrefutable evidence, I must not yield, lest I dishonor the name of the Knights of Beauty.

t_ch: 但倘若你所言确实非虚…「纯美」在上，我们就借这场命中注定的对决检验你的能力吧！
t_en: But if what you say is true... In the name of Beauty, let us use this fated duel to test your mettle!

t_ch: 虽然抵达后我一度因不善言辞而被当作身材高大、身着银铠、如烈焰般火红而炽热的通缉犯…但无妨，这一切都是来自梦想之地的「纯美」历练。
t_en: Though upon arrival, I was once mistaken for a towering, silver-armored fugitive with fiery red flames, due to my lack of eloquence... it matters not, for all these trials stem from the Land of Dream's Beauty.

t_ch: 重要的是，此身如今已立于此处——狭路相逢，我，「纯美骑士团」的银枝，恳求与二位展开一场骑士道的较量！
t_en: What matters is that I now stand before you — our paths have crossed. I, Argenti of the Knights of Beauty, am humbly requesting for a battle with you both in the name of the Code of Chivalry!

t_ch: 如果我有幸得胜，就请各位为我让出通向桂冠的阶梯，还要承认——
t_en: If I am fortunate enough to emerge victorious, kindly grant me passage to the crown of victory and recognize that...

t_ch: ——纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
t_en: ...Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!

t_ch: 漂亮！漂亮！真是一场精彩的对决！是各位让我明白，为了捍卫伊德莉拉的美名，我还需多加砥砺精进…多么美丽的教训！
t_en: Beautiful! Beautiful! Truly a captivating contest! It is through you that I realize, to uphold the honor of Idrila, I must further hone my skills... What a beautiful lesson indeed!

t_ch: 去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们……
t_en: Go forth, my dear friend, beautiful miss, the audition's crown is yours to claim...

t_ch: 我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。
t_en: I shall remain here, gazing from afar as you bask in the limelight, joining the audience in offering you the most heartfelt cheers and applause.

t_ch: 我们的时间已经不多了…有缘再见，纯美的骑士。
t_en: We don't have much time... May fate allow us to meet again, Knight of Beauty.

t_ch: 噢！这突如其来的畅快感……
t_en: Wow! This sudden surge of joy...

t_ch: 起作用了，滴答！接下来，只要进入它的心境空间，帮它连通通路，就大功告成了！
t_en: It's working, tick-tock! Next, we just need to enter its Emoscape, help connect its pathways, and we're done!

t_ch: 难以置信，匹诺康尼竟然存在着…「秩序」的残党。
t_en: Unbelievable, to think that there would be... remnants of the Order on Penacony.

t_ch: 你们把杨叔和知更鸟小姐怎么了？！
t_en: What have you done with Mr. Yang and Miss Robin!?

t_ch: 请放心，只是给了他们一点独自沉思命运的时间。
t_en: Don't worry. I just gave them some time alone to ponder their fates.

t_ch: 你应该明白，这么做意味着与星穹列车为敌。
t_en: You should know that these actions make you an enemy of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 即便一定要与各位无名客为敌，也只有我和橡木家系而已。但我们还没走到那一步，不是么？
t_en: Should we need to stand against the Nameless, it would only be myself and the Oak family involved. But we haven't reached that point yet, have we?

t_ch: 各位为匹诺康尼的公义四处奔走，这一点是所有人都看在眼里的。
t_en: Your efforts for the justice of Penacony are evident to everyone and have been widely observed.

t_ch: 你想和我们谈条件？
t_en: You want to talk terms with us?

t_ch: 聪明，孩子。你的思想和那位先生一样灵敏。
t_en: Smart kid. You're just as sharp as the other one.

t_ch: 别打哑谜了，说重点。
t_en: Stop beating around the bush and get to the point.

t_ch: 耐心是一种美德。不过我不会责备你。相反，我正要表明来意。
t_en: Patience is a virtue. However, I won't hold it against you. On the contrary, I'm here to make my intentions clear.

t_ch: 快把杨叔还给我们！
t_en: Give Mr. Yang back to us, now!

t_ch: 我会的，但这要取决于此次谈判的结果。
t_en: Oh I intend to, but that hinges on the outcome of this negotiation.

t_ch: 如果是「秩序」驱使你囚禁瓦尔特和知更鸟，还要借此胁迫我们乖乖就范，那我想，我们根本没有坐下谈判的必要。
t_en: If it is the Order that drove you to imprison Welt and Robin, and you're using them to coerce our compliance, then there'll be no point in entertaining any type of discussion.

t_ch: 您误会了，姬子小姐。他们很安全，正如家族一如既往的承诺，没有人会在梦境里受到伤害，更遑论属于「秩序」的美丽新世界。
t_en: You're mistaken, Miss Himeko. They are in very safe hands, and just as The Family has always proclaimed — no one can be harmed in the Dreamscape, least of all in the beautiful new world belonging to the Order.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼和这片宇宙都见证过太多无辜的鲜血。强者向弱者挥刀，胜者将败者的生命推向尽头……
t_en: Penacony and the entire universe have witnessed far too much innocent bloodshed. The strong wield their blades against the weak, and the victors push the vanquished to the brink of life...

t_ch: 自然选择——世界遵循这一法则，将全人类的福祉建立在弱者的遗骸上。只有{RUBY_B#「秩序」的命途行者}我们{RUBY_E#}，或者说我，有能力终结这出荒唐的闹剧。
t_en: Natural selection — the world abides by this principle, establishing the well-being of humanity atop the corpses of the downtrodden. Only {RUBY_B#Pathstriders of Order}we{RUBY_E#}, or rather I, possess the power to put an end to this farce.

t_ch: 你们打算复活一位已死的星神？从来没有人做到过这件事。
t_en: So you've decided to resurrect a dead Aeon? No one's ever done such a thing.

t_ch: 既然姬子小姐有兴趣，我们就打开天窗说亮话吧。我始终认为，人们可以通过和平的方式理解彼此。
t_en: If Miss Himeko is interested, let's draw back the veil and speak candidly. I've always firmly believed that people can understand one another through peaceful means.

t_ch: 我愿意将「秩序」行者的志向如实告知各位，以便你们做出对星穹列车，匹诺康尼，和这片宇宙更好的判断。语言苍白无力，难以描绘出那理想的面貌……
t_en: I'm willing to divulge the unembellished truth as to the intentions of the Order's Pathstriders, so that you will make better judgment for the Astral Express, for Penacony, and for this stretch of the universe. Words can hardly do justice to the beauty of that ideal...

t_ch: 所以随我来吧，各位。让我们一起重走来时的路，再看看这路将要通向何方。
t_en: So come with me, everyone. Let us retrace our steps and see once again where this road leads.

t_ch: 咦，他怎么消失了？
t_en: Huh, where'd he go?

t_ch: 欢迎，这里不是匹诺康尼梦境的任何一角。而是我的内心世界。面前的景象之所以没有变化，是因为各位的意识提取了相似的概念予以补全。
t_en: Welcome. This isn't any location in Penacony's Dreamscape. It's my inner world. The reason the scenery before you remains unchanged is because your consciousness has drawn on similar concepts to fill in the gaps.

t_ch: 你囚禁了我们？
t_en: You've imprisoned us?

t_ch: 什么人会展示自己的内心啊…
t_en: Who in their right mind would expose their inner-self like this?

t_ch: 就是说……
t_en: That means...

t_ch: 你…也对瓦尔特做了同样的事吗？
t_en: Did you do the same to Welt?

t_ch: 这是一种「调律」，效果更强，也更费神。{NICKNAME}此前经历过，{M#他}{F#她}应该能明白。
t_en: It's a "tuning" process, stronger in effect and more draining on the mind. {NICKNAME} has experienced it before, so {M#he}{F#she} should understand what it entails.

t_ch: 透过调律，各位可以更直观地理解我的情绪，这也意味着我将对你们毫无隐瞒。
t_en: Tuning allows you to intuitively grasp my feelings, which also means that I cannot hide anything from you.

t_ch: 接下来，我想请各位观看大屏幕，我们来时的路，就从这里开始。
t_en: Now, everyone, please look at the huge screen. The road we once took begins here.

t_ch: 从这里开始，各位将看到我经历过的诸多抉择。我选取了其中一部分与你们分享。
t_en: From this point on, you will witness the numerous decisions I've faced. I've selected a portion of these to share with you.

t_ch: 我想，在经历了共同的困境后，各位一定能够理解我的想法。
t_en: I believe after going through similar predicaments, you'll be able to better understand my thoughts.

t_ch: 开始吧。第一个抉择，与一只雏鸟的故事有关。
t_en: Let's begin. The first decision: A story about a baby bird.

t_ch: 这则故事发生在我和知更鸟很小的时候。我们是星核之灾的受害者，家族的歌斐木先生——也就是日后的匹诺康尼梦主——见我们兄妹两人无依无靠，便收养了我们。
t_en: This story happened when Robin and I were very young. We were victims of the Stellaron Disaster, and The Family's Mr. Gopher Wood — who would later become the Dreammaster of Penacony — saw that we siblings had no one to turn to and took us in.

t_ch: 那之后，我和知更鸟度过了一段相对无忧无虑的时光。某一天的晚餐后，我和妹妹在歌斐木先生的庭院里意外发现了一只孤单的小谐乐鸽。
t_en: Later on, Robin and I lived a time with nary a care in the world. One day, after dinner, while my younger sister and I were lounging about in Mr. Gopher Wood's yard, we spotted a fledgling Charmony Dove all on its own.
